name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings.

name: Cooling Beach Towel
description: Extra-large, quick-dry microfiber beach towel with vibrant summer prints. Sand-resistant and ultra-absorbent.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Water-resistant SPF 50 sunscreen lotion that provides broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection for all skin types.

name: Inflatable Pool Float
description: Giant inflatable flamingo pool float perfect for lounging in the water. Durable PVC with a quick-inflate valve.

name: Portable Mini Fan
description: USB rechargeable handheld mini fan with 3-speed settings. Lightweight and perfect for outdoor summer days.

name: Waterproof Sun Hat
description: Wide-brim waterproof sun hat with UPF 50+ protection. Foldable and packable for easy travel.

name: Insulated Water Bottle
description: 32oz stainless steel insulated water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. Leak-proof and BPA-free.

name: Flip Flops
description: Comfortable anti-slip flip flops with cushioned footbed. Perfect for beach, pool, or casual summer walks.
